title: Onboarding screens - Login button without wifi [New]
scenario: Login button on onboarding screen shows "Something is wrong" screen when Wi-Fi is turned off
steps: 1. Start the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
2. Accept the license agreement and privacy policy, then tap Continue.
3. Turn off Wi-Fi on the device.
4. Tap the Login button on the onboarding screen.
expected: A "Something is wrong" screen appears, indicating no network connection.
